name: Nera Telecommunications Ltd
summary: Nera Telecommunications Ltd designs, engineers, sells, distributes, installs, services, and maintains telecommunication systems and products in transmission networks and satellite communications, and information technology networks in Singapore, Malaysia, Philippines, Indonesia, Thailand, Pakistan, Morocco, Europe, Middle East, Africa, and internationally. It operates through two segments, Wireless Infrastructure Networks (WIN) and Network Infrastructure (NI). The WIN segment provides wireless infrastructure network solutions, including in-building, outdoor coverage enhancement, RF access network optimization, benchmarking, and microwave solutions, as well as 3G/4G/LTE base stations and 5G-ready solutions. It serves clients in a range of sectors, such as service providers, ISPs, broadcasters, enterprises, government organizations, offshore, and utilities. The NI segment offers cloud solutions; cybersecurity products, including firewalls, intrusion prevention systems, and encryption products, as well as security information and event management, and privilege access management products; and security assessment services. It also provides intent-based networking products; carrier-grade optical network solutions, including long haul systems, metro DWDM applications, optical multi-service platforms, and mobile front-haul solutions to serve mobile backhaul, business services, DC interconnection, and edge aggregation; and content creation, acquisition, and IP video transport solutions, as well as encoders/multiplexers, and transmission and network management systems to broadcasters and service providers. In addition, this segment offers automated solutions to navigate and manage services across multi-cloud infrastructure; and consulting services to identify automation governance model, change management plan, and deployment strategy. The company was incorporated in 1978 and is headquartered in Singapore. Nera Telecommunications Ltd is a subsidiary of Asia Systems Ltd.
